examples: To make it start, you just pull this thingamajig out.
Dad, what do you call that thingamajig you use to shave with?
Um... I'm looking for my... um... you know, that thingamajig.
Maybe somebody will be replacing some thingamajig for their furnace. (Laughter.) They've been putting that off.
Pinterest, the image-sharing social bookmarking thingamajig, is growing quite rapidly.
